channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran updates: Trump still undecided after Situation Room meeting
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Dallas explosion kills at least 3, injures 5, officials report
item.description: The casualty count may change as rescue crews continue searching through debris.

item.title: White House reports Trump in excellent health after physical exam
item.description: President Trump's physician stated in a letter released Friday that the president is in excellent health after a physical earlier this week.

item.title: White House releases Trump physical exam report
item.description: The White House has published a memo detailing the results of President Donald Trump's recent physical exam.
